description:
Minor cleanups in consumer modules:
- scanner.ex:21 - remove unused 'require Logger'
- manager.ex:162-178 - consolidate 3 job action functions to 1
- manager.ex:144-148 - collapse :ok and {:ok, _} cases
- pointer_gc.ex:69 - add error logging for failed GC

Lower priority - less impact than Store changes.
title: Clean up consumer module redundancy
